creator: svyatoslav.lempert@gmail.com
text:
ports-mgmt/dialog4ports can't be build because distfile is missing and no other ports depended from this ports able to install with last portsnap snapshot

Fix: 

Put dialog-1.1-20120706.tgz to ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles or change something other in port
How-To-Repeat: 	ameac# make config
===> Building/installing dialog4ports as it is required for the config dialog
===>  Cleaning for dialog4ports-0.1.3
=> dialog4ports-0.1.3.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://m1cro.tk/dialog4ports/dialog4ports-0.1.3.tar.gz
dialog4ports-0.1.3.tar.gz                     100% of 9743  B   24 kBps
=> dialog-1.1-20120706.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.

fetch: ftp://invisible-island.net/dialog/dialog-1.1-20120706.tgz: Not logged in

fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/dialog-1.1-20120706.tgz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)

=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
